agreeToCustomPrivacyPolicy.description: Consent for updating the custom privacy URL. Not required when resetting the URL.

emailDomainId.description: The ID of the email domain

isDefault.description: If `true`, the Brand is used for the Okta subdomain

locale.description: The language specified as an [IETF BCP 47 language tag](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc5646)

removePoweredByOkta.description: Removes "Powered by Okta" from the sign-in page in redirect authentication deployments, and "© [current year] Okta, Inc." from the Okta End-User Dashboard
